features: 💗【Perfect French False Nail Kit】This french manicure kit includes 240pcs french style square press on nails glossy, all necessary tools as files*1, stainless steels cuticle pusher*1,nail glue*1 and the box with press on nails. French tip false nail is a basic style in nail art and is a must have set for every girl who loves nail art.

💗【Full Cover Nail Tips】The acrylic press on nails are made of high quality acrylic with perfect long coffin shape, the top is thicker design, the bottom has shallower edges and slight curves, which can fit your real nails perfectly, not easy to break and won't hurt your nails!

💗【High Quality】Our short French tip ballerina false nails are made of premium ABS +Acrylic material, a glossy surface, malleable, natural and pre-shaped. Comfortable and No Stinging! Selected the most suitable radian and thickness for women, more comfortable to wear

💗【15 Sizes for You】These short square nails comes in 15 different sizes of each size, which makes it a total of 240 pieces. With the professional nail sizes database, make it easier to find one that suits you

💗【Widely Application】Suitable for all social occasions and home use. Our french nails are suitable for weddings, parties, dates, Halloween, Christmas and proms. These cute and stylish nails also make great gifts for sisters, wives, family and girlfriends.
description: Product description Package Contents: - 240Pcs false nails - 1 bottle nail glue - 1 stainless steels cuticle pusher - 1 Two-sided nail file How to Use? Step1: Remove the cuticle with nail tool. Step2: Clear nails and keep the nails dry. Step3: Apply glue on fake nails. Step4: Press on and hold for 10 seconds. Step5: Finish. How to Remove? Step1: Soak your nails in warm water for 10-15 minutes. (You can also wrap your nails in nail polish remover for 3 minutes.) Step2: Lift the fake nails from the edge with the small wooden stick. And clean the glue on the false nails for next use. Directions See 'product_description' field for detailed instructions on how to use and remove the false nails.
